description: Moraine dam collapse at Dig Tsho (Langmoche Valley, Khumbu). Destroyed Namche Small Hydropower Plant 11 km downstream, 14 bridges, caused 12 fatalities. Damage extended 50-60 km downstream.

lake.name: Dig Tsho
lake.notes: Some sources estimate 6-10M m3; 5M is the conservative estimate from Vuichard and Zimmermann 1987

valley.notes: Manning's n=0.10 reflects debris-laden GLOF flow conditions (published range 0.08-0.15 for GLOF debris flows in boulder-bed mountain streams). Higher than normal river flow (0.06-0.08).
